# Project Setup

This project is a tool that helps developers manage their configuration files. It is written in Bash. You can install it by cloning the repository and running the install script. The install script will copy the files to your home directory. After installation, you can run the command from anywhere. The tool reads a config file from your home directory. If the config file is missing, the tool will create a default one. You can edit the config file to change the behavior of the tool.
